title: Asia needs to play smarter to win climate dollars
description: Extreme weather disasters are increasingly devastating South and Southeast Asia, causing billions in losses annually. Despite global responsibility for climate change, the region receives minimal adaptation finance, struggling to build protective infrastructu…
content: Every month, disasters caused by extreme weather kill more people in South and Southeast Asia. In January, a landslide in Indonesias West Java followed heavy rain and led to dozens of deaths includin… [+5513 chars]
de: Asien muss klüger vorgehen, um Klimagelder zu gewinnen. Extreme Wetterkatastrophen verwüsten zunehmend Süd- und Südostasien und verursachen jährlich Schäden in Milliardenhöhe. Trotz der weltweiten Verantwortung für den Klimawandel erhält die Region nur minimale Anpassungsfinanzierungen und kämpft darum, schützende Infrastrukturen aufzubauen …
en: Asia needs to play smarter to win climate dollars. Extreme weather disasters are increasingly devastating South and Southeast Asia, causing billions in losses annually. Despite global responsibility for climate change, the region receives minimal adaptation finance, struggling to build protective infrastructu…
la: Asia opus est smarter ludere ut dollaria caeli vincat. Clades tempestatis extremae Meridionalis et Southeast Asiam magis magisque vastant, unde billions in damna quotannis faciunt. Quamquam responsabilitas globalis pro mutatione climatis, regio minimam aptationem oeconomicis accipit, ut tutela infrastructu aedificare nititur.
